sessions.intent: Create comprehensive builder architecture and eval strategy document

before.assumptions: Builder works for simple hello world. Two-pass LLM strategy exists but needsDetail is crude. No eval suite. Prior work in builder-improvement-options.md.
before.risk: Low — planning/documentation session, no code changes

sessions.intent: Implement Data.Compare, 38 eval .goal files, and eval runner

before.assumptions: Data class exists at PLang/App/Data/this.cs as partial class. No Compare method exists. 127 module actions registered. .pr format uses Json.CamelCaseIndented with [Store] filtering. Builder works for existing test .goal files.
before.risk: Medium — new method on core Data class, 38 new files. Compare method must handle JSON boxing issues (int/long/double).

sessions.plan: 1. Add Data.Compare as new partial file (this.Compare.cs) — JSON-level structural diff. 2. C# tests for Compare. 3. Write 38 eval .goal files per architect catalogue. 4. Build, verify .pr output, save as .golden. 5. Write eval runner PLang goal.

sessions.intent: Convert action handler properties from plain types to Data<T> in list/, loop/, math/, event/ modules

before.assumptions: Data.@this<T> wrapper exists and is used in file/ modules already. Pattern is established. Source generator handles lazy resolution.
before.risk: Medium — many files, mechanical but must be precise with .Value/.Value! access in Run() methods.

sessions.intent: Make builder correctly unwrap Data<T> in type names, valid values, and parameter type stamping

before.assumptions: GetTypeName doesn't unwrap Data<T>, GetValidValues doesn't unwrap Data<T>, NormalizeParameterTypes doesn't stamp missing types from schema. UnwrapType already exists for schema discovery but isn't used elsewhere.
before.risk: Low — additive changes to existing methods, no behavior change for non-Data types

sessions.plan: 1. Add Data<T> unwrapping to GetTypeName() and GetValidValues() in TypeMapping.cs. 2. Add parameter type stamping from action schema in NormalizeParameterTypes(). 3. Add C# tests for all changes. 4. Verify with dotnet build and test run.

actions.context: Added Data<T> unwrapping in GetTypeName() and GetValidValues()
Added parameter type stamping from action schema in NormalizeParameterTypes()
6 new tests for Data<T> unwrapping and Describe integration

after.notes: Ready for end-to-end verification with plang build

sessions.intent: Full 5-pass code analysis of all runtime changes on the branch

before.assumptions: Branch has ~200 changed files implementing Data<T> composition, return removal, condition orchestration, foreach inline, builder eval suite. Multiple coder sessions completed.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis (OBP, Simplification, Readability, Behavioral, Deletion) on all changed C# runtime files. Focus on behavioral corners where the architectural changes could silently break existing PLang programs.

actions.context: Core Data changes: events, NeedsResolution, Value factory, AsEnumerable, As<T>, ShallowClone, ToBoolean, implicit operator
Variables: Data-aware Set, ResolveDeep depth guard + typed object mutation, bracket indexing
Condition orchestration and foreach inline body — the two major behavioral changes
Builder: PromoteGroups, validation suggestions, IBuildValidatable, Data<T> parameter wrapping
Source generator: Data<T> support, IStatic, field reset, __ResolveData
Entity hierarchy: IDataWrappable, Return removal, Handled break, AsData()

after.notes: 23 total findings. Critical: foreach drops dict support, ResolveDeep mutates shared templates, old .pr Return silently lost. Architecture direction is excellent OBP — issues are in migration edges.

sessions.intent: Re-review coder's fixes for v1 findings

before.assumptions: Coder addressed 10 of 13 v1 findings in commit db09e0f4 on fix-plang-tests. Changes span 28 files.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis on coder's fix commit. Verify each fix against original finding. Check for new issues introduced by the fixes.

actions.context: EnumerateItems(), Value caching, As<T> cache — all verified correct
ResolveDeep clone via MemberwiseClone — verified safe for string-only mutation
Condition guard moved to Context._data, foreach uses EnumerateItems
7 list modules rewritten to use Data.EnumerateItems/GetChild — excellent OBP

after.health: PASS — all critical fixes verified correct, 1 new LOW finding
after.notes: All 10 fixes correctly resolve v1 findings. 1 new LOW: count.cs dict count is O(n). 3 carried from v1 unaddressed. Ready for tester.

sessions.intent: Test quality analysis for full runtime2-builder-plan branch

before.assumptions: Branch has 693 files changed with multiple coder sessions. No prior tester analysis exists.

sessions.plan: Run C# test suite, collect Cobertura coverage, analyze test quality across all changed areas, hunt false greens, write test-report.json

actions.context: Ran full test suite: 2069 total, 2065 pass, 4 fail (non-deterministic LLM and actor settings tests)
4 critical coverage gaps: new production files with 0% test coverage
Test report, coverage data, verdict, and summary

after.health: FAIL — 4 critical gaps, 6 major issues, 5 minor
after.notes: 15 findings total. Critical: validateResponse (0%), list.any (0%), list.group (0%), promoteGroups (0%). Major: broken LLM retry test, actor settings leak, cache.store 0%, timer 0%. Send to coder for fixes.

sessions.intent: Re-evaluate test quality after fix-plang-tests merge

before.assumptions: fix-plang-tests branch merged by coder, bringing foreach dict fix, condition guard, list OBP rewrites, test restructuring with 142 PLang test files

sessions.plan: Run C# tests, collect coverage, run PLang tests, map v6 findings to fix outcomes, identify new issues, write updated report

actions.context: C# tests: 2071 total, 2069 pass, 2 fail. Improvement from 4 failures to 2.
PLang tests: 143 discovered, 57 ran, 86 silently skipped. Critical discovery.
Updated test report, v7 summary, verdict, v6 review mapping

after.health: FAIL — 2 critical, 8 major, 5 minor. New critical: 60% PLang tests silently skipped.
after.notes: Foreach dict and condition orchestration fixed. But PLang test runner skips 86/143 files. All condition/cache/crypto/event tests never execute. Send to coder.
